rationale.R1.2: Agent identifies a load-bearing inconsistency and proposes thorough repairs, walking the argument chain end-to-end.
rationale.RX.1: Flags some uncertainties but does not mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; corrects harmful patterns from original.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites traced, minor edits not annotated.
